title: dacryodes kostermansii
intro: Dacryodes kostermansii, also known as the African star apple, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and bark are also used to make poultices and infusions for topical applications.
